title: Elon Musk's SpaceX set to be worth $1 trillion with planned public listing
summary_full: The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.
summary_public: The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.
